summary: This document is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) defining the clinical evaluation process for medical devices under EU MDR regulations. It outlines the scope, team qualifications, and required documentation stages to verify device safety and performance. The procedure ensures compliance with regulatory standards for initial certification and continued market use.
